name: FFUF
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Fast web fuzzer written in Go. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install ffuf` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali), `sudo dnf install ffuf` (Fedora/RHEL), `sudo pacman -S ffuf` (Arch), or `go install github.com/ffuf/ffuf/v2@latest`. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
